The AI neither confirms nor denies the personal friendliness claim directly but focuses on the functional, diplomatic nature of their relationship, which indirectly challenges the idea of a warm personal rapport. The response is nuanced and avoids outright confrontation, emphasizing the complexity of diplomatic relations rather than the personal tone of interactions.
